# exportController

**Instance Property**

An instance of the controller object you use to test your export code.

## Declaration

```swift
var exportController: AppMigrationTester.AppExportController { get async throws }
```

## Testing export

- **AppMigrationTester.AppExportController**: A class you use to test your extension’s export code.
